jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mphasis
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mphasis in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mphasis:
Mphasis is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis!
